mapper.select: SELECT ORG_ID , ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /* 설 명 : 사용자최근로그인이력저장 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_USER_LGN_HSTRY ( USER_LGN_HSTRY_ID, USER_ID, ACSR_TYCD, LGN_IP, LGN_DTTM, LGN_SCSYN, CNTN_DVC_TYCD, LGN_CNTN_BRWSR, SESS_ID, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userLgnHstryId}, #{userId}, #{acsrTycd}, #{lgnIp}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{lgnScsyn}, #{cntnDvcTycd}, #{lgnCntnBrwsr}, #{sessId}, #{userId}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
